decks.notes: The main concept of this UWx Control deck is to use a combination of counter magic, card selection, and win conditions like Thassa's Oracle and Jace, Wielder of Mysteries to control the game and win through alternative win conditions such as milling or drawing cards. The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's threats, disrupting their game plan, and ultimately winning through card advantage and efficient interactions. The deck aims to out value and outplay the opponent by managing resources effectively and adapting to various strategies.

This deck focuses on using a combination of cards like Lotus Petal, Dark Ritual, and Doomsday to quickly assemble a winning combination of cards, often involving Thassa's Oracle. It utilizes control elements like Force of Will, Daze, and Thoughtseize to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to win the game in a single explosive turn, using its card selection and mana acceleration to set up the perfect sequence of plays leading to victory. The Fantasticar serves as a versatile tool for digging through the deck and finding key pieces for the combo.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive early creature plays, utilizing cards like Guide of Souls, Amped Raptor, and Ocelot Pride to quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck also includes removal spells like Swords to Plowshares to deal with threats, while Thalia, Guardian of Thraben helps to disrupt opponents' plans. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides powerful buffs and versatility, while Static Prison helps to control the board. The inclusion of land destruction with Wasteland and utility lands like Karakas and Sunbaked Canyon further solidify the deck's aggressive game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble a powerful combo revolving around using The Fantasticar along with key artifacts like Voltaic Key and Manifold Key to generate a large amount of mana and play cards like Mystic Forge and Kozilek's Command to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes cards like Chalice of the Void and Grim Monolith to further enhance the combo potential. With the right sequence of plays and card draws, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through its unique synergy and powerful combos.

The main concept of this Bant Control Legacy deck is utilizing a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to control the game and outvalue the opponent. The deck focuses on controlling the board with cards like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares, while also generating card advantage through cards like Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. Additionally, the deck aims to stabilize the board with creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Solitude, while also ramping up with spells like Up the Beanstalk to eventually take over the game and win through attrition.

This Boros Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. The deck includes powerful creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls, along with disruption elements such as Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Wasteland. By combining creature abilities like Goblin Bombardment and Ocelot Pride with direct removal spells like Swords to Plowshares, the deck aims to control the battlefield and push through damage quickly. The inclusion of cards like Karakas and Plateau provide additional versatility to deal with a variety of threats and situations.

This deck focuses on using The Fantasticar to quickly assemble a win condition, most likely with the Doomsday combo. It utilizes a variety of cantrips and fast mana to dig for combo pieces and protect the player's game plan. The primary goal is to efficiently and consistently combo off and win the game before the opponent has a chance to disrupt the combo. The deck is designed to be proactive and able to win in a few turns, making it a powerful and threatening force in the Legacy format.

This Eldrazi Aggro deck focuses on using powerful Eldrazi creatures like It That Heralds the End and Thought-Knot Seer to quickly overwhelm the opponent. With mana acceleration from cards like Ancient Tomb and Lotus Petal, along with disruptive spells like Chalice of the Void, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. The inclusion of Eldrazi Confluence and Kozilek's Command provides additional versatility and removal options, making it a formidable and fast-paced deck in Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to generate card advantage and quickly assemble a powerful board presence. By combining aggressive creatures like Goblin Welder and Krang, Master Mind with efficient mana-producing artifacts such as Mox Opal and Lotus Petal, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents early in the game. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga provide additional ways to recur or tutor for key artifacts, while cards like Force of Will offer protection against opposing threats. Overall, the deck aims to win through a combination of aggressive creature attacks and resource denial.

The deck focuses on utilizing mana acceleration and ramping with cards like Gaea's Cradle, Noble Hierarch, and Green Sun's Zenith to quickly build up a board presence. It also utilizes control elements like Wasteland and Sylvan Safekeeper to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence with creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Endurance, and close out the game with powerful finishers like Craterhoof Behemoth. Overall, the deck aims to control the game while setting up explosive win conditions through efficient mana usage and creature synergy.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using cards like Helm of Obedience and Leyline of the Void to exile opponent's library, while utilizing cards like Ancient Tomb and Dark Ritual to quickly ramp up mana. Dauthi Voidwalker and Profane Tutor help to find key pieces of the combo, while Force of Despair and Fell the Profane provide disruption against opposing strategies. The deck's win condition revolves around mill and exile effects, ultimately leading to a victory through a carefully executed combo.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and disrupting the opponent's game plan by using disruptive cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Thoughtseize. It also utilizes Aether Vial to cheat creatures into play and maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck has a solid mana base with fetch lands and mana denial cards like Wasteland, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Stoneforge Mystic and Skyclave Apparition to control the board. The deck's game plan is to apply pressure on the opponent while disrupting their strategy, ultimately leading to victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing a variety of control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating card advantage and value through cards like Baleful Strix, Tamiyo, and Narset. It aims to control the board with removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Fatal Push, while also utilizing counterspells like Force of Will to protect its own threats. The inclusion of cards like Yuriko and Kaito provide additional win conditions and allow the deck to close out games quickly once it has established control. The deck also features some powerful sideboard options to further tailor its strategy to different matchups.

This deck focuses on pressuring the opponent with aggressive creatures like Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler while disrupting their game plan with countermagic like Daze and Force of Will. It aims to control the board with removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Wasteland, all while maintaining card advantage and filtering through the deck using cantrips like Brainstorm and Ponder. The deck efficiently utilizes its mana base to consistently cast its threats and disruption spells, overwhelming the opponent with a fast and efficient game plan.

This deck focuses on utilizing creatures with strong abilities and efficient mana ramp to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes a mix of disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and efficient creatures like Green Sun's Zenith to maintain board control. Natural Order is a key card to quickly search for powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth or Atraxa, Grand Unifier. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive strategy, with cards like Gaea's Cradle and Wasteland to generate mana advantage and disrupt the opponent's resources. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early and close out games swiftly.

The main concept of this Control - Pox deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's resources while generating advantage through cards like Hymn to Tourach, Smallpox, and Liliana of the Veil. The deck aims to strip the opponent's hand with discard spells like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek, while also using efficient removal like Wasteland and Sinkhole to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The deck also utilizes cards like Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth and Urbza's Saga to generate additional resources and maintain control over the game.
